name: Yueyang Xingchang Petro-Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Yueyang Xingchang Petro-Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical products in China. Its products include isobutene, non-woven propylene, polypropylene resin powder, propylene, methyl tert-butyl ether, industrial methanol, propane, industrial hydrogen, liquefied petroleum gas, and plastic woven bags. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Yueyang, China.
